task: AI Agent 长程任务可视化管理系统调研与设计

LiteLLM.key_feature: 100+ LLM providers, cost tracking, fallback routing

Cronicle.key_feature: distributed task scheduler with Web UI

Dagu.key_feature: cron replacement with step dependency graph

tech_selection.realtime: SSE recommended over WebSocket for dashboard (simpler, HTTP-compatible, auto-reconnect)
tech_selection.backend: Fastify 3-4x faster than Express, built-in validation/logging
tech_selection.storage: SQLite for lightweight VPS, Postgres for scale
tech_selection.frontend: Lit (like OpenClaw Control UI) or vanilla SPA
